description: TPM persona — inspect_sources for the 26ai FA DB Upgrade Confluence project plan page (pageId=20030556732). Sample content is an abbreviated excerpt from the page showing the WBS table structure and metadata fields.

normalised_intent.description: Weekly executive review PPTX for the FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai project.

vars.sample_content:
# FAaaS Project Plan — FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai

## Section 1: Project Metadata
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Project Name | FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai |
| Current Phase | Design and POC |
| Overall Status | PLANNED |
| Project Manager | R. Sharma |
| Start Date | 2026-03-01 |
| Target Completion | 2026-09-30 |

## Section 3: Objectives and Scope
**Executive Summary:** Provision new pods running 26ai DB on OCI Compute to replace the existing 19c infrastructure. Zero-downtime migration with rollback capability.

**Business Outcome:** Reduce DB licensing cost by 40%, improve query performance by 2x for OLAP workloads, enable vector search for next-generation FA features.

**Dependencies:** FRE (Repo, NGFABS etc)

## Section 4: Milestones
| Milestone | Status | Due Date |
|---|---|---|
| M1: Architecture design complete | PLANNED | 2026-04-15 |
| M2: POC on dev environment | PLANNED | 2026-05-30 |
| M3: SIT | PLANNED | 2026-07-15 |
| M4: ORM approval | PLANNED | 2026-08-01 |
| M5: Production cutover | PLANNED | 2026-09-20 |

## Section 5: WBS (Work Breakdown Structure)
| ID | Task | Status | Owner | Due | Update Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1.0 | Project Initiation | GreenComplete | R. Sharma | 2026-03-15 | |
| 2.0 | Architecture Design | BlueIN PROGRESS | Arch Team | 2026-04-15 | |
| 2.3 | Design review sign-off | GreyNOT STARTED | Arch + PM | 2026-04-30 | |
| 3.0 | Capacity provisioning | GreyNOT STARTED | Infra Ops | 2026-05-15 | OCI quota request filed |
| 4.0 | ORM/CSSAP Phase | GreyNOT STARTED | TPM | 2026-08-01 | Depends on 2.3 |
| 4.1 | File ORM/OCI Release Management | GreyNOT STARTED | TPM | 2026-07-15 | |
| 4.2 | File official CSSAP Record | GreyNOT STARTED | Cloud Security | 2026-07-30 | |
| 5.0 | External Dependencies (FRE) | BlueIN PROGRESS | FRE Team | 2026-05-31 | 4/29: FRE informed that this deliverable needs additional time. ETA to be finalized. |
| 5.01 | NGFABS schema compatibility | BlueIN PROGRESS | FRE/Dev | 2026-05-31 | Blocked on FRE resource allocation |
| 6.0 | ADP Development | BlueIN PROGRESS | Dev Team | 2026-07-01 | |
| 6.04 | POC environment setup | GreenComplete | Dev Team | 2026-05-01 | POC Completed |
| 6.04.1 | SUT environment | GreyNOT STARTED | Dev/Infra | 2026-06-01 | SUT will need to start from 05/16 to 06/01 |
